ns0:entry.ns0:title: ClickHouse/ClickHouse
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ClickHouse/ClickHouse
Language: c++
ClickHouse® is a real-time analytics database management system

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NVIDIA-AI-Blueprints/video-search-and-summarization

The NVIDIA VSS Blueprint is a suite of reference architectures for building GPU-accelerated vision agents and AI-powered video analytics applications.

URL: https://github.com/apple/foundationdb
Language: c++
FoundationDB - the open source, distributed, transactional key-value store

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ceph/ceph
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ceph/ceph
Language: c++
Ceph is a distributed object, block, and file storage platform

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dmlc/xgboost
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dmlc/xgboost
Language: c++
Scalable, Portable and Distributed Gradient Boosting (GBDT, GBRT or GBM) Library, for Python, R, Java, Scala, C++ and more. Runs on single machine, Hadoop, Spark, Dask, Flink and DataFlow

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/doitsujin/dxvk

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dolphin-emu/dolphin
Language: c++
Dolphin is a GameCube / Wii emulator, allowing you to play games for these two platforms on PC with improvements.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/electron/electron
Language: c++
Build cross-platform desktop apps with JavaScript, HTML, and CSS

ns0:entry.ns0:content:

Luanti (formerly Minetest) is an open source voxel game-creation platform with easy modding and game creation

ns0:entry.ns0:title: organicmaps/organicmaps
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/organicmaps/organicmaps
Language: c++
🍃 Organic Maps is a free Android & iOS offline maps app for more than 6M travelers, tourists, hikers, and cyclists. It uses crowd-sourced OpenStreetMap data and is developed with love by the community. No ads, no tracking, no data collection, no crapware. Please donate to support the development!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: react/react-native
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/react/react-native
Language: c++
A framework for building native applications using React

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/stack-of-tasks/pinocchio
Language: c++
A fast and flexible implementation of Rigid Body Dynamics algorithms and their analytical derivatives

ns0:entry.ns0:title: tensorflow/tensorflow
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/tensorflow/tensorflow
Language: c++
An Open Source Machine Learning Framework for Everyone

ns0:entry.ns0:title: xbmc/xbmc
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/xbmc/xbmc
Language: c++
Kodi is an award-winning free and open source home theater/media center software and entertainment hub for digital media. With its beautiful interface and powerful skinning engine, it's available for Android, BSD, Linux, macOS, iOS, tvOS and Windows.
